An announcement from Banca Profilo SPA ( (IT:PRO) ) is now available.

Banca Profilo has announced that its controlling shareholder, Arepo BP S.p.A., has submitted individual proposals for resolutions and voting on the sixth, seventh and eighth items on the agenda of the upcoming Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for 23 and 24 April 2026. The bank has made these shareholder proposals publicly accessible at its Milan registered office, via the 1INFO storage system, and on its corporate website, enhancing transparency ahead of the key governance votes.

The move underscores the active role of the controlling shareholder in shaping Banca Profilo’s corporate decisions and may influence the direction of resolutions to be adopted at the meeting. By ensuring broad public availability of the proposals, the bank is providing shareholders and market participants with information to assess the potential impact on governance and future strategic positioning.

data.title: Clifford Modern Living Deepens Precious Metal Bets in Major Transaction
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd ( (HK:3686) ) has provided an update.

Clifford Modern Living Holdings has placed an order using internal resources to purchase about 70,600 ounces of allocated silver bullion for roughly HK$42.9 million, marking its third silver investment as part of a broader precious metals strategy involving multiple silver and gold positions executed through a bank. While the third silver purchase alone is classified as a discloseable transaction under Hong Kong listing rules, the aggregation of all recent silver and gold investments crosses the 25% threshold, making it a major transaction that requires reporting, public announcement and shareholder approval, which the company is able to obtain via written consent since no shareholder is deemed to have a material interest or must abstain from voting.

The move underscores the group’s ongoing use of precious metals as a treasury management tool, signaling a more substantial balance sheet exposure to bullion that could affect its risk profile and earnings volatility depending on metal price movements, while also highlighting the regulatory scrutiny and governance procedures tied to large-scale financial investments by Hong Kong–listed firms. For existing shareholders, the announcement clarifies that the enlarged investment portfolio in silver and gold is being executed within listing rule parameters without diluting voting rights or requiring a physical general meeting, potentially streamlining execution but concentrating more corporate resources in non-core financial assets.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3686) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd stock, see the HK:3686 Stock Forecast page.

More about Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd

Clifford Modern Living Holdings Ltd is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, which engages in treasury management activities that include investing in precious metals such as allocated silver bullion and both allocated and unallocated gold through banking channels to manage its financial resources and enhance returns.

Average Trading Volume: 879,473

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$751.7M

data.title: Roadzen Targets Rapid Revenue Growth and EBITDA Breakeven
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Roadzen Inc ( (RDZN) ) has provided an update.

On April 7, 2026, Roadzen Inc. told investors at the Maxim Group “Powering the AI Revolution” Virtual Conference that it is operating at an annualized revenue run rate of about $60 million and is targeting roughly $100 million within six to twelve months, and that it expects to reach adjusted EBITDA breakeven in the current quarter. Management highlighted the firm’s decade-long investment in proprietary data and its more than 300 task-specific AI models, claiming measurable gains for clients including a 72% cut in accident rates via its DrivebuddyAI platform and a roughly 10-point combined-ratio improvement versus the U.S. auto insurance average.

Roadzen underscored its role as a founding member of the AI Alliance and emphasized that its competitive edge lies in deploying high-accuracy AI in real-money insurance decisions, supported by approximately 4 billion driving miles and 100 million historical claims in its datasets. The company also stressed the strategic importance of being the only provider certified under India’s AIS-184 standard for in-vehicle AI safety systems, positioning it to benefit from India’s deferred 2027 mandate for AI-based safety technology in new commercial vehicles, which it estimates could translate over time into a potential incremental annual revenue opportunity of about $200 million, subject to regulatory enforcement, OEM adoption, and execution.

The most recent analyst rating on (RDZN) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Roadzen Inc stock, see the RDZN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RDZN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RDZN is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance—deep losses, ongoing cash burn, and negative equity—despite strong revenue growth and solid gross margins. Technicals remain bearish-to-neutral with the stock below key longer-term moving averages. Valuation is constrained by a negative P/E and no dividend support, while the recent AGM outcome is a modest positive for governance continuity.

To see Spark’s full report on RDZN stock, click here.

More about Roadzen Inc

Roadzen Inc. operates in the automotive insurance and AI-enabled mobility technology sector, providing specialized artificial intelligence platforms for underwriting risk assessment, claims adjudication, and real-time driver behavior analysis. The company leverages proprietary telematics data, more than 300 AI models, and large-scale insurance datasets to deliver high-precision, production-grade AI solutions to insurers, fleet operators, and automotive OEMs, with a particular focus on fast-growing markets such as India’s commercial vehicle segment.

Average Trading Volume: 152,739

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $87.67M

data.title: Pico Far East Sets Terms and Timetable for Special Scrip Dividend
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pico Far East Holdings ( (HK:0752) ) has provided an announcement.

Pico Far East Holdings has confirmed the scrip dividend arrangement tied to its special dividend of HK4.5 cents per share for the year ended October 31, 2025, giving shareholders the option to receive the payout in cash or in new fully paid shares. The issue price for these scrip shares has been set at HK$2.522, based on the average closing price over five trading days to April 10, 2026, and fractional share entitlements will be rounded down with any residual benefit accruing to the company.

The company will seek listing and permission to deal in the new scrip shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, with a circular and election form to be dispatched to shareholders on April 21, 2026 and election due by May 6, 2026. Share certificates for the scrip shares are expected to be mailed on May 26, 2026, with trading in these shares slated to commence on May 27, 2026, a timetable that underlines the company’s use of equity-based distributions to manage capital while maintaining shareholder flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0752) stock is a Buy with a HK$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pico Far East Holdings stock, see the HK:0752 Stock Forecast page.

More about Pico Far East Holdings

Pico Far East Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company engaged in providing integrated marketing, event management and related services across Asia and other markets. The group typically focuses on brand activation, exhibitions, and experiential solutions for corporate and institutional clients, leveraging its regional presence and stock market listing to support growth and shareholder returns.

Average Trading Volume: 827,232

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

On April 9, 2026, Lantern Pharma Inc. conducted a live demonstration of its withZeta.ai platform, showcasing the multi-agentic AI co-scientist’s capabilities in rare cancer drug discovery, development and clinical trial design. The presentation detailed the platform’s commercial architecture, rare cancer market opportunity, competitive positioning and the company’s near-term revenue strategy and growth roadmap tied to the rollout of withZeta.ai.

The event underscored Lantern’s bid to carve out a competitive position in the emerging market for AI-enabled oncology R&D tools, with management highlighting software licensing and subscription models as future revenue drivers. However, the company also flagged substantial risks, including funding needs, uncertainty around research success, the possibility that partnerships may not materialize and the chance that commercialization efforts for withZeta.ai may fall short of anticipated revenue and market adoption.

An announcement from Hochschild Mining ( (GB:HOC) ) is now available.

Hochschild Mining has published its 2025 Annual Report and Accounts, following its previously released full-year results, and made the report, shareholder circular and related documents available via the UK National Storage Mechanism and on its website in line with listing and transparency rules. The company has also confirmed that its 2026 Annual General Meeting will take place on 9 June in London, asking investors to register attendance in advance and encouraging the use of proxy voting to ensure shareholder participation.

These disclosures formalise Hochschild’s 2025 financial reporting cycle and set the timetable for key shareholder governance decisions at the AGM. The process underlines ongoing regulatory compliance and provides investors and other stakeholders with detailed information on the group’s performance and strategy as it continues to develop its silver and gold operations across the Americas.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HOC) stock is a Buy with a £729.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hochschild Mining stock, see the GB:HOC Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HOC is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by the sharp financial improvement in 2024–2025 and very compelling valuation (low P/E and high dividend yield). This is partially offset by mixed technical signals, including a negative MACD and trading below the 50-day moving average.

To see Spark’s full report on HOC stock, click here.

More about Hochschild Mining

Hochschild Mining PLC is a precious metals producer listed in London and trading on the OTCQX in the U.S., focused on the exploration, mining, processing and sale of silver and gold. The company operates two underground epithermal vein mines, Inmaculada in Peru and San Jose in Argentina, as well as the Mara Rosa open pit gold mine in Brazil, and holds a portfolio of long-term projects across the Americas.

data.title: Sino-Ocean Subsidiary Flags RMB17.19 Billion in Overdue Debt and New Lawsuit
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sino-Ocean Group Holding ( (HK:3377) ) has shared an announcement.

Sino-Ocean Group Holding has disclosed new financial stress at its wholly owned subsidiary Beijing Sino-Ocean Group Holding, which reported overdue borrowing principal of RMB17.19 billion as of 31 March 2026. The overdue amount increased by RMB0.41 billion in March, mainly due to higher overdue bank loans, while public market financing remained unchanged and some entrusted and non-bank borrowings declined slightly.

The subsidiary also faced a new major litigation in March involving borrowing disputes of about RMB1.87 billion, adding to existing court cases. The group acknowledged that the mounting arrears and lawsuits are exerting adverse pressure on the subsidiary’s operations and debt-servicing capacity, but said day-to-day management and business remain normal as it negotiates with creditors and institutions to pursue holistic debt solutions and pledges ongoing regulatory disclosures.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3377) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sino-Ocean Group Holding stock, see the HK:3377 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sino-Ocean Group Holding

Sino-Ocean Group Holding Limited is a Hong Kong-incorporated company engaged through its subsidiaries in property-related operations in mainland China. Its wholly owned unit, Beijing Sino-Ocean Group Holding Limited, is a key onshore financing and operating platform within the group, with activities funded by bank loans, public market financing, entrusted loans and borrowings from non-bank institutions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell
